user.title: Tinder MCP — Sign In
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with Tinder.

data_description.method:
**Phone number (SMS)**: Tinder sends you a code by SMS — recommended.
**Manual token**: paste an X-Auth-Token obtained from browser DevTools.

phone.title: Tinder MCP — Phone Number
phone.description: Enter your number in international format (e.g. +33612345678). Tinder will send you a 6-digit code by SMS.

otp.title: Tinder MCP — SMS Code
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code received by SMS on {phone}.

token.title: Tinder MCP — Manual Token
token.description: Paste your Tinder **X-Auth-Token** (from browser DevTools → Network tab → X-Auth-Token header).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Tinder API.
error.sms_unavailable: SMS sending is not available. Use the manual token method instead.
error.no_refresh_token: Tinder response did not include a refresh_token.
error.no_api_token: Tinder response did not include an api_token.
